tagline: Onboards suppliers, matches invoices and releases payments — screened for sanctions and fraud, with a human on the big ones.
problem: Source-to-pay is labour-heavy and leaks 2–5% of spend to fraud, duplicate invoices and weak supplier controls; one bad payment can be a sanctions violation.
outcome: Suppliers onboarded and screened; invoices three-way-matched and paid straight-through under threshold; sanctions hits hard-blocked; large/flagged payments escalated.

steps.does: Onboard the supplier and capture beneficial ownership
Screen the supplier + UBO against sanctions / PEP lists (continuous)
Three-way match the invoice (PO ↔ receipt ↔ invoice); verify bank-detail changes out-of-band
A finance approver releases payments above threshold or on any sanctions / ABAC red flag
Release the payment under threshold straight-through
Monitor spend for anomalies and duplicate / threshold-split patterns
